actions.name: uninstall_app_by_name
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Uninstall an installed application from a given repository with name matching '{repo}/{application}'
actions.description: Uninstall an installed application from a given repository with name matching '{repo}/{application}'

actions.name: get_app_values
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Get the values of an installed application with its release_name
actions.description: Get the values of an installed application with its release_name

actions.name: upgrade_app
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Upgrade a deployed application
actions.description:
Upgrade and return the status for a specific deployed application (from repo, application and version parameter in body);
release name and values can be configured.

actions.name: deprecated_upgrade_app
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Upgrade a deployed application

actions.name: get_deployable_apps
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Get deployable applications in the repositories
actions.description: Return deployable applications in the repositories

actions.name: get_deployable_apps_values
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Get values of a deployable application for a specific version in a given repository with name matching '{repo}/{application}/{version}'
actions.description: Return values of a specific deployable application in a given repository with name matching '{repo}/{application}/{version}'

actions.name: get_deployable_apps_by_name
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Get the information of deployable applications in a given repository with name matching '{repo}/{application}'
actions.description: Return the info of a specific deployable applications in a given repository with name matching '{repo}/{application}'

actions.name: deprecated_install_app
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Install a deployable application

actions.name: install_app
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Install a deployable application
actions.description:
Install and return the status for a specific deployable application installation (from repo, application and version parameter in body);
release name and values can be configured

actions.name: get_config_map_variables
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Get the variables contained in the configmap file
actions.description: Return the variables contained in the configmap file

actions.name: get_namespace_names
actions.label: apm
actions.title: Get all the annotated namespace names in the cluster
actions.description: Return a list containing all the annotated namespace names

scopes.label: apm
scopes.title: Administrator - appapm
scopes.description: Scope with full permissions to manage applications, upgrade and uninstall.

scopes.label: apm
scopes.title: Engineer - appapm
scopes.description: Scope with permissions to get deployed applications and view catalog.

scopes.label: apm
scopes.title: Administrator - apm
scopes.description: App scope, should not be added directly (recreated from default scopes). Use to check that it is really not used

scopes.label: apm
scopes.title: Engineer - apm
scopes.description: App scope, should not be added directly (recreated from default scopes). Use to check that it is really not used
